_comment: This file contains the physical properties of the robot, including its mass,
wheel grip coefficient of friction, and current limits for the drive and
angle motors.  This data is based on guesswork and should be updated with actual
The gear ratio values are based on the 'Swerve X Gear Ratios (Flipped, Gears Below)'
documentation from West Coast Products, which can be found at:
Weights and dimensions are in imperial units, because that's what YAGSL expects. (*shrug*)
